title: Zen meditation: an integration of current evidence.

assets.abstract: Despite the growing interest in the neurobiological and clinical correlates of many meditative practices, in particular mindfulness meditations, no review has specifically focused on current evidence on electroencephalographic, neuroimaging, biological, and clinical evidence about an important traditional practice, Zen meditation. A literature search was conducted using MEDLINE, the ISI Web of Knowledge, the Cochrane collaboration database, and references of selected articles. Randomized control

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=10.0: links Formless/Absorption concept to mechanistic neuroscience
